events.summary: Combined Full Staff & Monthly Leadership meeting

prep.summary: You are preparing for a combined staff and leadership meeting dominated by high-impact transitions—specifically the rollout of Project IVA to the board and ongoing engineering reorganization. Unresolved ownership debates around Scan AI and Celonis—paired with the push for unified developer governance—remain critical friction points. Reviewing your sent emails from this week's Monday and Thursday sessions will establish the necessary baseline to coordinate these cross-cutting corporate priorities.
tasks: Review your sent emails to synthesize key takeaways from the Monday and Thursday HP meetings—focusing on the engineering feedback cascaded to Tech Fellows.
Resolve the funding and contract scope discrepancy for Scan AI—clarifying whether P&C and the Contact Center will merge into a single business case.
Confirm the rollout readiness of Project IVA—ensuring employee feedback channels are functioning prior to the board presentation.
Align with Deepak on the Tuesday dialogue agenda—verifying that the filtered list of ten engineering feedback items is ready for staff distribution.
Audit the progress of the YAML-based taxonomy pipeline—ensuring Pravina's team has stabilized the VS Code automation scripts.
prep.title: Combined Full Staff & Monthly Leadership meeting

focus_html:
Focus · Next up
9:00 AM — 10:00 AM

Combined Full Staff & Monthly Leadership meeting

https://usaa.zoom.us/j/9683...
Prep

You are preparing for a combined staff and leadership meeting dominated by high-impact transitions—specifically the rollout of Project IVA to the board and ongoing engineering reorganization. Unresolved ownership debates around Scan AI and Celonis—paired with the push for unified developer governance—remain critical friction points. Reviewing your sent emails from this week's Monday and Thursday sessions will establish the necessary baseline to coordinate these cross-cutting corporate priorities.

  • Review your sent emails to synthesize key takeaways from the Monday and Thursday HP meetings—focusing on the engineering feedback cascaded to Tech Fellows.
  • Resolve the funding and contract scope discrepancy for Scan AI—clarifying whether P&C and the Contact Center will merge into a single business case.
  • Confirm the rollout readiness of Project IVA—ensuring employee feedback channels are functioning prior to the board presentation.
  • Align with Deepak on the Tuesday dialogue agenda—verifying that the filtered list of ten engineering feedback items is ready for staff distribution.
  • Audit the progress of the YAML-based taxonomy pipeline—ensuring Pravina's team has stabilized the VS Code automation scripts.
